:"阅读106小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":382869,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4491},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7197793574334464806","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书第一次看的时候，没记错应该是五六年前，还在上学，当时主角还在地球位面，今年突然想到这个小说，到今天坚持看完了，果然不错，和平时的那种都市爽文不一样，更有高度，也没有烂桃花这些乱七八糟的，而且最后把主角光环写的如此合理，这个属实佩服，从地球写到了神域，风格转换也有，应该算是我看过的小说里面，情节最丰满的了","text_exts":[{"e":73,"s":69,"text":"都市爽文","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E9%83%BD%E5%B8%82%E7%88%BD%E6%96%87\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774067534DEBC325B%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227197793574334464806%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226881619412101630984%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%83%BD%E5%B8%82%E7%88%BD%E6%96%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1675867049,"group_id":"6881619412101630984","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5hFn4SSQP6ZBrMtm/44ENE96jn+UKyks0VRjKZVds5M","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4076625964836507","user_name":"玄冰殿的绫清竹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4076625964836507","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1717955894,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_col
